answers.text: 当前围绕选中的 Recycle Pump (pump-12) 与 Trim Cooler (cooler-12) 及其关联流股生成候选编辑提案。共检测到 2 条错误和 2 条警告：pump-12 出口压力目标低于入口压力且效率超出合理范围；cooler-outlet-81 未连接下游消费者导致拓扑无效。由于 cooler-12 的警告 (COOLER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED) 明确指出在下游连接恢复前冷却器本身仅作解释性上下文，因此本轮不对 cooler-12 配置生成 patch，仅针对有直接诊断支撑的三个问题提出候选修正。

proposed_actions.title: 为 Trim Cooler Outlet 添加下游连接占位
proposed_actions.rationale: cooler-outlet-81 当前无 target_unit_id，求解器因拓扑不完整而无法收敛。此处插入连接占位符，待用户指定实际下游单元（如回收罐、混合器或出口边界）。注意：这是拓扑重连操作，会改变求解行为。

proposed_actions.title: 修正 Recycle Pump 出口压力目标至高于入口压力
proposed_actions.rationale: 入口流股 feed-81 压力为 190 kPa，当前目标 150 kPa 低于入口，泵无法正常工作。建议将 outlet_pressure_target_kpa 上调至合理值（占位 350 kPa，用户应根据工艺需求确认）。同时 pump-outlet-81 的 specs.pressure_kpa=155 也与当前目标不一致，修正后应由求解器重新计算，此处仅标记为需关注。

issues.message: Trim Cooler Outlet is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Recycle Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.
Recycle Pump efficiency_percent=108 is outside the recommended operating range.
Trim Cooler outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the cooler itself should remain explanatory context only.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_DISCONNECTED
citations.excerpt: Trim Cooler Outlet is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.

citations.label: 诊断 PUMP_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_INVALID
citations.excerpt: Recycle Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.

citations.label: 诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE
citations.excerpt: Recycle Pump efficiency_percent=108 is outside the recommended operating range.

citations.label: 诊断 COOLER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED
citations.excerpt: Trim Cooler outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the cooler itself should remain explanatory context only.
